title: The Reason for the Battle between Abu Ahmad and the Zanj and What Transpired
description: The Reason for the Battle between Abu Ahmad and the Zanj and What Transpired. Recorded under the year 268 AH (882–883 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 37.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 37
